name: GH_DeveloperDetails
summary: Constains a set of static fields and properties regarding developer contact details.

properties.name: DefaultDeveloperContact
properties.summary: Gets the default developer contact details.

properties.name: DeveloperContact
properties.summary: Gets or sets the local developer contact info (e-mail). By default, the developer email is DefaultDeveloperContact; This email address is used in the Message Report viewer when sending a support e-mail.
